fields.summary: Provides static methods for encoding images and animated sequences to the WebP format.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoder` is a static utility class that encodes an
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap> to WebP using an
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions> configuration. Both lossy and lossless
encoding are supported through the options struct. Animated WebP sequences can
be created by passing a span of <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> objects.

This type has no state and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
using var bitmap = new SKBitmap(200, 200);
using var canvas = new SKCanvas(bitmap);
canvas.Clear(SKColors.CornflowerBlue);

var options = new SKWebpEncoderOptions(SKWebpEncoderCompression.Lossy, 80);
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.Encode(bitmap.PeekPixels(), options);
File.WriteAllBytes("output.webp", data.ToArray());
```
]]></format>

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? Encode (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP and returns the result as an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> object.

params.src: The source pixel data to encode.
params.options: The encoding options, including compression type and quality.

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the WebP-encoded image, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding failed.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP and writes the result to the given write stream.

params.src: The source pixel data to encode.
params.dst: The destination stream that receives the encoded WebP data.
params.options: The encoding options, including compression type and quality.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (System.IO.Stream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP and writes the result to the given managed stream.

params.src: The source pixel data to encode.
params.dst: The destination managed stream that receives the encoded WebP data.
params.options: The encoding options, including compression type and quality.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? EncodeAnimated (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified frames as an animated WebP and returns the result as an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> object.

params.options: The encoding options applied to all frames.
params.frames: The frames to include in the animated WebP, each with its own duration.

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the animated WebP, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding failed.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified frames as an animated WebP and writes the result to the given write stream.

params.dst: The destination stream that receives the animated WebP data.
params.frames: The frames to include in the animated WebP, each with its own duration.
params.options: The encoding options applied to all frames.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (System.IO.Stream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified frames as an animated WebP and writes the result to the given managed stream.

params.dst: The destination managed stream that receives the animated WebP data.
params.frames: The frames to include in the animated WebP, each with its own duration.
params.options: The encoding options applied to all frames.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
